title: 'ayil #0352
definition:
1) ram
    1a) ram (as food)
    1b) ram (as sacrifice)
    1c) ram (skin dyed red, for tabernacle)
 2) pillar, door post, jambs, pilaster
 3) strong man, leader, chief
 4) mighty tree, terebinth
